# technitium_dhcp_scopes (Data Source)

Lists all DHCP scopes configured on the server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "technitium_dhcp_scopes" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `scopes` (Attributes List) All DHCP scopes. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--scopes))

<a id="nestedatt--scopes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `scopes`

Read-Only:

- `broadcast_address` (String)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `ending_address` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `network_address` (String)
- `starting_address` (String)
- `subnet_mask` (String)
